chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1142 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on office objection For hearing of M.A. 4031/2022 For hearing of main case 10.08.2022 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- Learned Additional Advocate General Sindh submits that this petition has served its purpose as FIR No.27/2022 for quashment of which this petition has been filed has been disposed of under ‘C’ class. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
